articles.author: Duarte  Dias, Eleanor  Watson, Chris  Livesay
articles.title: Search underway for 2 U.S. service members missing after training exercises in Morocco - CBS News
articles.description: The service members were participating in African Lion, the largest joint military exercise on the continent.
articles.content: A search and rescue operation is underway in southern Morocco after two U.S. service members were reported missing off the southern coast of the North African nation during annual training exercises.… [+1861 chars]
